examples: If you come across a wayward chunk of moon, don't try to cash in on it.
These passions, like great winds, have blown me hither and thither, in a wayward course, over a deep ocean of anguish, reaching to the very verge of despair.
He sent a wayward effort wide with both Tevez and Emmanuel Adebayor well placed in the middle.
Varndell notched the third Wasps try after a good period of pressure, Walder's conversion again wayward.
